LanguageData.FCP_Vertibird.description: Vertibird is a designation for a series of vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft. These multipurpose tiltrotor aircraft were developed by the United States military and rapidly became a primary gunship and transport aircraft.
LanguageData.FCP_Vertibird.label: vertibird
LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdIncoming.label: vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdLeaving.label: vertibird (leaving)
